title: AFI AnalystInputEnvelope v1 (District 2 M1 DRAFT)
description: DRAFT / NON-IMPLEMENTATION wrapper around a strategy-local enriched view handed to an analyst. The envelope is strict and canonical; the strategyLocalView payload inside it is intentionally opaque and NON-CANONICAL. Nothing inside strategyLocalView is protocol canon, and it is NOT canonical hash material by default — it may only participate in hashing via the explicit, domain-declared strategyLocalViewHash pin. This schema deliberately does NOT expand or canonize FroggyEnrichedView or any other strategy-specific view.
$comment: Guard against accidental canonization: when strategyLocalView is present, the envelope MUST declare the view via strategyViewType and/or enrichedViewSchemaRef (draft-07 'dependencies'). An anonymous/undeclared strategy-local payload is invalid.
x-afiPartOf: AFI District 2 — Canonical Data & Provenance Boundary (D2 M1)
x-afiDoctrineRefs: District 2 D-17 decision — authorizes D2 M1 only (afi-config schema drafts and tests)
District 2 hash doctrine — opaque strategy-local payloads are not hash material unless explicitly pinned via a domain-declared CanonicalHash

x-afiOpenItems.AIE-O1: strategyViewType namespace/registry — OPEN; opaque non-empty string in this draft.
x-afiOpenItems.AIE-O2: Whether enrichedViewSchemaRef must resolve to a registered schema — OPEN; free-form ref string in this draft.

schema.description: Schema version identifier for AnalystInputEnvelope v1.

signalId.description: Stable unique identifier of the signal this envelope carries (same id space as USS provenance.signalId).

providerId.description: OPTIONAL stable identifier of the signal provider (provider identity at the envelope boundary).

analystId.description: OPTIONAL identifier of the analyst this envelope targets.

strategyId.description: OPTIONAL identifier of the strategy whose local view is wrapped.

strategyLocalView.description: The strategy-local enriched view, as an intentionally opaque object. NON-CANONICAL: contents are strategy-local, are not protocol canon, and are not canonical hash material by default. Requires declaration via strategyViewType and/or enrichedViewSchemaRef when present.

strategyViewType.description: Declaration of the strategy-local view's type (e.g. 'froggy-enriched-view'). Required (or enrichedViewSchemaRef) whenever strategyLocalView is present.

enrichedViewSchemaRef.description: Declaration by reference: pointer to the (strategy-owned, non-canonical) schema describing the strategy-local view. Required (or strategyViewType) whenever strategyLocalView is present.

strategyLocalViewHash.description: OPTIONAL explicit, domain-declared CanonicalHash v1 pin of the serialized strategy-local view. This is the ONLY way the opaque view participates in canonical hashing; the inline object is never implicit hash material.

sourceDisclosureProfiles.description: SourceDisclosureProfile v1 objects for the sources feeding this envelope.

evidenceRefs.description: EvidenceRef v1 objects backing the enrichment carried by this envelope.

replayProfileRef.description: OPTIONAL reference to a ReplayProfile v1 pinning the replay inputs for this envelope.
